value.found_quote: Tracing is built into the Agents SDK and is enabled by default in the normal server-side SDK path. Every run can emit a structured record of model calls, tool calls, handoffs, guardrails, and custom spans, which you can inspect in the Traces dashboard.
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes Built-in Run Tracing under the "Tracing" section, confirming it is built into the Agents SDK, enabled by default, and emits a structured record of model calls, tool calls, handoffs, guardrails, and custom spans viewable in a Traces dashboard — matching all elements of the claim. The feature is described as currently active with no deprecation or preview caveats.
